areaLabel: Inner Ford Road and Camp Slice
notes: Twelfth real slice extends the reed-ferry route into a second ford checkpoint without introducing a new runtime branch. It keeps the shared clerk -> sentry -> gate -> shop -> chest -> encounter rhythm, but pressure shifts toward keeping cross-chapter portals, save/load parity, and chapter-local reference gaps manageable as the back-half queue advances. / 第十二段真实切片把芦渡路线继续推进到第二个河渡检查点，同时不引入新的 runtime 分支。它继续复用共享的文吏 -> 守兵 -> 栅门 -> 商店 -> 宝箱 -> 遭遇战节奏，但压力开始转向：在后半程队列继续扩张时，如何保持跨章 portal、存档恢复一致性，以及章节级 reference 缺口的可控。
title: Inner Ford Approach
